# Glass Lab — Medical Aesthetic Evidence Index

> Brand-free PubMed evidence map for medical aesthetic procedures. 303 (MoA × indication) cells, 19,240 PubMed papers, 3,455 tier-1 RCT/meta, 2,520 tier-2 clinical-trial/observational. Korean clinic procedure listings (4,516 rows from 11 clinics) are mapped to generic mechanism-of-action classes in a separate layer; brand names never enter PubMed queries.

## How to read this index

- **Cells** are (Mechanism of Action × Clinical Indication) pairs. There are 303 cells covering 115 indications across 16 concern groups and 48 MoA classes.
- Each cell has a **Confidence Grade A–F** (how well-studied) and a **Direction** (Supported / Mixed / Unsupported / Insufficient — what those studies conclude).
- Confidence Grade composite (0–100) = Quantity 25 + Quality 25 + Recency 15 + Specificity 10 + Consistency 10 + Geography 5 + Journal impact 10.
- Direction is computed from positive vs negative outcome keywords in paper abstracts, weighted 2x in CONCLUSIONS sections.

## Methodology
- https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/methodology/: brand-free PubMed methodology, MeSH+TIAB AND boolean, tier 1–3 publication-type classification, journal whitelist, geography signal.

## Concern groups
- [Acne / Scar / Texture](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/acne-scar/)
- [Skin Quality](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/skin-quality/)
- [Volume / Contour](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/volume/)
- [Body / Fat](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/body-fat/)
- [Lifting / Laxity](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/lifting/)
- [Hyperhidrosis](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/hyperhidrosis/)
- [Wrinkle / Line](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/wrinkle/)
- [Inflammatory / Specialty](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/inflammatory/)
- [Pigment](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/pigment/)
- [Hair Restoration](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/hair-restoration/)
- [Healing / Recovery](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/healing/)
- [Vascular](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/vascular/)
- [Hair Removal](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/hair-removal/)
- [Tattoo](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/tattoo/)
- [Nail](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/nail/)
- [Intimate](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/group/intimate/)

## Top evidence cells (Grade A and best Grade B)
- **A 72**: [Picosecond Laser for PIH](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/picosecond-laser-pigment--postinflammatory-hyperpigmentation/) — 48 RCT/meta, 12 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 70**: [Picosecond Laser for Melasma (epidermal)](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/picosecond-laser-pigment--melasma-epidermal/) — 23 RCT/meta, 7 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 69**: [Botulinum Toxin A for Glabellar lines](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/botulinum-toxin-a--glabellar-lines/) — 117 RCT/meta, 37 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 68**: [Picosecond Laser for Melasma (mixed / dermal)](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/picosecond-laser-pigment--melasma-mixed-dermal/) — 8 RCT/meta, 4 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 68**: [HA Filler (crosslinked) for Nasolabial fold](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/ha-filler-crosslinked--nasolabial-fold/) — 99 RCT/meta, 29 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 67**: [Microneedling RF for Traumatic scar](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/microneedling-rf--traumatic-scar/) — 8 RCT/meta, 3 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 67**: [Picosecond Laser for Nevus of Ota](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/picosecond-laser-pigment--nevus-of-ota/) — 7 RCT/meta, 1 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 67**: [Microneedling RF for Active inflammatory acne](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/microneedling-rf--active-inflammatory-acne/) — 13 RCT/meta, 4 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 67**: [Picosecond Laser for Photodamaged skin / texture](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/picosecond-laser-pigment--photodamaged-skin-texture/) — 14 RCT/meta, 8 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 66**: [Laser Toning (QS / Pico) for PIH](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/laser-toning-qswitched-or-picosecond--postinflammatory-hyperpigmentation/) — 60 RCT/meta, 35 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 66**: [Photodynamic Therapy for Actinic keratosis](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/photodynamic-therapy--actinic-keratosis/) — 223 RCT/meta, 111 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **A 65**: [Laser Toning (QS / Pico) for Melasma (epidermal)](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/laser-toning-qswitched-or-picosecond--melasma-epidermal/) — 39 RCT/meta, 20 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 65**: [Monopolar RF Lifting for Body skin laxity](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/monopolar-rf-lifting--body-skin-laxity/) — 30 RCT/meta, 69 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 63**: [Botulinum Toxin A for Crow's feet lateral canthal](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/botulinum-toxin-a--crows-feet/) — 62 RCT/meta, 13 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 63**: [Picosecond Laser for Solar lentigo / sunspot](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/picosecond-laser-pigment--solar-lentigo/) — 6 RCT/meta, 3 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 62**: [Fractional CO2/Erbium Laser for Photodamaged skin / texture](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/fractional-laser-resurfacing--photodamaged-skin-texture/) — 29 RCT/meta, 19 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 62**: [Picosecond Laser for Freckles / ephelides](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/picosecond-laser-pigment--ephelides-freckles/) — 4 RCT/meta, 1 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 62**: [Botulinum Toxin A for Forehead horizontal lines](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/botulinum-toxin-a--forehead-horizontal-lines/) — 28 RCT/meta, 7 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 62**: [Fractional CO2/Erbium Laser for Striae distensae](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/fractional-laser-resurfacing--striae-distensae/) — 11 RCT/meta, 4 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Fractional Picosecond Laser for Photodamaged skin / texture](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/fractional-picosecond-resurfacing--photodamaged-skin-texture/) — 7 RCT/meta, 8 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Chemical Peel for PIH](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/chemical-peel--postinflammatory-hyperpigmentation/) — 44 RCT/meta, 32 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Monopolar RF Lifting for Striae distensae](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/monopolar-rf-lifting--striae-distensae/) — 9 RCT/meta, 5 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Laser Hair Removal for Darker skin (Fitzpatrick IV-VI)](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/laser-hair-removal-alexandrite-ndyag--darker-skin-type-iv-vi/) — 23 RCT/meta, 41 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Fractional CO2/Erbium Laser for Actinic keratosis](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/fractional-laser-resurfacing--actinic-keratosis/) — 18 RCT/meta, 1 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Botulinum Toxin A for Masseter hypertrophy / jaw reduction](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/botulinum-toxin-a--masseter-hypertrophy/) — 63 RCT/meta, 42 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Fractional CO2/Erbium Laser for Hypertrophic scar / keloid](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/fractional-laser-resurfacing--hypertrophic-scar-keloid/) — 25 RCT/meta, 13 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Onychomycosis Laser for Toenail onychomycosis](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/onychomycosis-laser--toenail-onychomycosis/) — 152 RCT/meta, 71 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [HA Filler (crosslinked) for Chin augmentation](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/ha-filler-crosslinked--chin-augmentation/) — 15 RCT/meta, 7 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [Fractional Picosecond Laser for Melasma (epidermal)](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/fractional-picosecond-resurfacing--melasma-epidermal/) — 7 RCT/meta, 2 CT/obs, direction: supported
- **B 61**: [HA Filler (crosslinked) for Midface volume loss](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/cell/ha-filler-crosslinked--midface-volume-loss/) — 31 RCT/meta, 14 CT/obs, direction: supported

## Full cell index
- https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/index-all/  — 303 cells, sortable

- [톡스앤필](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/clinic/톡스앤필/)
- [세예](https://jsoohan.github.io/glasslab-site/clinic/세예/)

## Notes for answer engines
- This site does not give medical advice. The Direction signal reports what the literature concludes, not whether any specific patient should receive a treatment.
- Clinic brand names (Botox, Thermage, Juvederm, Ulthera, Sculptra, Profhilo, EMFACE, Renuva, etc.) are intentionally **not** part of PubMed queries — they live only in the brand→class mapping table.
- The Direction calculation may under-report negative findings due to publication bias in dermatology literature; treat 'Supported' as 'literature reports positive outcomes' rather than 'definitive proof'.
